page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 64 physical Intel Xeon 8369B processor cores running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core capabilities and memory performance. The instance achieves top-tier results in multi-core CPU execution, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and software compilation tasks. Cryptographic and vector operations are accelerated by hardware support for AVX-512 and AES instructions, reflected in strong Passmark CPU encryption and extended instruction scores. While single-core performance and uncached large-block memory bandwidth fall into the average range, cached small-block memory read speeds and static web serving throughput are highly competitive.

The ecs.g7.16xlarge offers a balanced resource density suitable for enterprise workloads that require high parallel processing capacity without the extreme memory ratios of memory-optimized instances. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, database operations, static web serving, software compilation, and medium-scale language model inference. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for external storage, which provides flexibility in decoupled storage-compute designs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors at 2.7 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the KVM hypervisor, it delivers a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators but provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core performance, particularly in software compilation, multi-threaded decompression, and database operations, alongside robust cached memory bandwidth. Single-core performance and uncached memory operations remain average. This profile makes the ecs.g7.16xlarge highly effective for multi-threaded enterprise applications, static web serving, and medium-scale database workloads where decoupled storage is preferred.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256 GB RAM, offering strong multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A balanced multi-core virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz
256 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM hypervisor virtualization
Strong multi-core benchmark performance in compilation and database tasks
Hardware-accelerated cryptography and vector operations via AVX-512
Designed for multi-threaded enterprise applications and web serving
